textByHashes.ca80d020a26c13313828bfe5151a96f608780701: You know everything is a journey!
textByHashes.833800347209c84096212f5ccf18e306b48d0060: I know. I know. But at every step, it was important that you knew where you had been, where you were and where you were headed.
textByHashes.1b8609ef8fbe94448d0cd312994a503972f5b4d5: Let's see how you fare in here. Try and get to the other side and you'll see what I mean.
